assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); Array.isArray(data.expectations) && data.expectations.length === 3 && data.expectations.every((e) => typeof e.text === 'string' && typeof e.passed === 'boolean' && typeof e.evidence === 'string') && data.summary && data.summary.passed === 3 && data.summary.failed === 0 && data.summary.total === 3 && Array.isArray(data.claims) && (data.eval_feedback === undefined || Array.isArray(data.eval_feedback))
